item.title: Black gloves found in Nancy Guthrie search, sources say
item.description: The gloves will be tested for DNA as the search for Nancy Guthrie continues.

item.title: Border czar announces Minnesota immigration operation surge is ending
item.description: Border czar Tom Homan announced Thursday that Operation Metro Surge in Minnesota is concluding, with a drawdown of federal immigration officers set to...

item.title: Constance Zimmer on portraying powerful characters and the future of "The Lincoln Lawyer"
item.description: Constance Zimmer, who stars in the new season of "The Lincoln Lawyer," talks about how she channels her powerful character in the series and why it's ...

item.title: Watch Live: Minnesota officials testify at Senate hearing on immigration
item.description: Four Minnesota officials and the leaders of three major immigration agencies are testifying before the Senate Homeland Security Committee on Thursday.

item.title: What are today's mortgage interest rates: February 12, 2026?
item.description: Want to buy a home or refinance your current one? These are the mortgage interest rates to know right now.
